name: Traditional Hopping John
recipeIngredient: 2 Cups Fresh Blackeyed peas - or Purple hull peas
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the bacon and brown it in a Dutch oven with onion and peppers until crisp and vegetables are soft.
2. Add peas and rice, then water. Cover and simmer over very low heat for about 20 minutes, or until rice is tender.
3. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Add a dash of Louisiana Hot Sauce to taste.
This recipe was brought to America from Africa through the slave trade and is now considered the traditional dish served by most Southerners on New Year's Day. It is believed to bring good luck.
